type_definitions.name: ScopeConfigLoadError
type_definitions.description: Existing error_type returned by load_v2_scope_config when reading and decoding review-scope.json. This track adds a briefing_file field to GroupEntry but does not introduce new error variants; all failure modes (Io / Parse / InvalidField / Config) remain covered, including rejection of unknown fields via serde deny_unknown_fields. Declared with action=reference to document the infrastructure-layer touchpoint and satisfy the Stage 2 TDDD verification requirement that tddd.enabled layers carry at least one declared type.
